title: Rewind Conversation to Earlier Checkpoint

findings.description: No rewind or checkpoint controls are visible in the chat interface. Cannot test within an active conversation due to known issue (clicking existing conversations crashes the app).
findings.expected: Rewind/checkpoint controls should allow users to go back to earlier points in a conversation.
findings.actual: No rewind controls visible in new chat view. Blocked from testing in active conversation by known crash bug.
findings.blocked_by: Known issue: clicking existing conversations crashes the app

verdict: Feature not implemented. Additionally blocked from testing in active conversations by known crash bug.
